notes.en: Aliquot and store at −20°C. β-mercaptoethanol can be replaced with DTT (200 mM). Heat at 95–100°C for 5 min before loading.
notes.zh: 分装后 -20°C 保存。β-mercaptoethanol 可用 DTT (200 mM) 替代。使用前 95–100°C 加热 5 min。

storage.notes: Aliquot; add reducing agent fresh; -20°C for long storage

usage.en: 2× SDS-PAGE sample loading buffer for protein denaturation before gel electrophoresis.
usage.zh: SDS-PAGE 上样缓冲液（2×），蛋白变性后上样。

prepSteps.step: Dissolve SDS in 1 M Tris-HCl pH 6.8 by warming gently.
Add glycerol and bromophenol blue; mix well.

prepSteps.warning: β-mercaptoethanol is toxic and volatile — use in fume hood.

prepSteps.step: Bring to final volume of 10 mL with ddH₂O.
Aliquot 0.5–1 mL per tube and store at −20°C.
